commands.payload:
NClient.DotNetTool 0.13.0
Copyright (c) 2022 NClient

  facade     Generate facade interface for OpenAPI
  client     Generate client interface for OpenAPI
  help       Display more information on a specific command.
  version    Display version information.

result.stdout:
NClient.DotNetTool 0.13.0
Copyright (c) 2022 NClient

  n, name                   (Default: {client}) The client name.
  withFacades               (Default: false) The flag indicating whether to add
                            facade interfaces.
  a, api                    Required. The OpenAPI spec file to use. Paths are
                            relative to the project directory. You can also set
                            a http URI as path
  o, output                 (Default: ./Facades.cs) The result. File paths are
                            relative to the project directory.
  s, namespace              (Default: NClient.Facades) The namespace for
                            generated files.
  withModelValidation       (Default: false) The flag indicating whether to add
                            model validation attributes.
  withDto                   (Default: true) The flag indicating whether to
                            generate DTO classes.
  withCancellationTokens    (Default: false) The flag indicating whether to
                            allow adding cancellation token.
  useSystemTextJson         (Default: false) The flag indicating the use of the
                            SystemTextJson library for serialization.
  useNewtonsoftJson         (Default: false) The flag indicating the use of the
                            NewtonsoftJson library for serialization.
  nullableEnable            (Default: false) The flag indicating whether to
                            generate Nullable Reference Type annotations.
  loglevel                  (Default: Information)
  help                      Display more information on a specific command.
  version                   Display version information.
